sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 35:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 35:1
items.html: No division of the degree is apparent in the Rosh of SAG, although this is where the coupling of the bottom Hey in the Einayim is rooted. Instead, a new Partzuf called Se’arot Dikna is added there, in the form of Se’arot, and whose AHP departed. (Inner Light, Item 2)
